title: The Coffee Shop Bookmark
hook: I leave my book behind every Tuesday on purpose.
setup: The café cat is tucked inside the bookmark. The next week, the drawing has a reply.
escalation: My notes grow longer each visit. The barista writes: 'You're twenty pages ahead of me.'
climax: Today, I walk up to the counter. He slides my coffee over.
ending: A bookmark sits on the saucer, featuring a perfect sketch of my own face.
visualMoments: Close up of a book abandoned on a café table
Hand-drawn cat doodle in the margins of a page
Barista glancing over the counter with a subtle smile
Student approaching the counter with a nervous breath
The drawing of the student's face on the bookmark
